sellerName.description: seller company name printed in the top-right header (株式会社 ...)

sellerPhone.description: seller telephone number (TEL) in the top-right header

buyerName.description: buyer / addressee name shown after 御中 on the left

buyerAddress.description: buyer address shown after 御住所

issueDate.description: issue date printed top-right in Japanese era format, exactly as shown

lineItems.description: one entry per product row in the item table

productCode.description: product code (商品コード) as printed

discountPercent.description: discount percentage (値引き), numeric without percent sign

remark.description: remark column (適用), e.g. 特別セール割引; empty if none

grandTotal.description: grand total (合計) in yen, number only without 円 or separators
